creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 147921
Patch to the ports tree

Update graphics/converseen to 0.8.4

Redports is not suitable for QA since pkg 1.3.8 :( so there are false positives about leftovers:

https://redports.org/~fernape/20141001164901-18406-249262/converseen-0.8.4.log
https://redports.org/~fernape/20141001164901-18406-249263/converseen-0.8.4.log
https://redports.org/~fernape/20141001164901-18406-249264/converseen-0.8.4.log
https://redports.org/~fernape/20141001164901-18406-249265/converseen-0.8.4.log

port test on my machine detects no errors.

The patch is pretty simple.
